title: podman generate kube does not generate env fields in output yml
body:
/kind bug



**Description**

`podman generate kube` does not generate correct container environment:


**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. 
``` 
podman run -dt   --env MYSQL_DATABASE=db    --env MYSQL_USER=nextcloud    --env MYSQL_PASSWORD=123    --env MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=123    --volume /data/mariadb:/var/lib/mysql:Z      --restart on-failure    --name db   docker.io/library/mariadb:latest --skip-innodb-read-only-compressed
```

2.
`podman generate kube db`



```
# Save the output of this file and use kubectl create -f to import
# it into Kubernetes.
#
# Created with podman-3.4.2
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  annotations:
    bind-mount-options:/data/mariadb: Z
  creationTimestamp: "2022-02-08T22:49:44Z"
  labels:
    app: db
  name: db
spec:
  containers:
  - args:
    - --skip-innodb-read-only-compressed
    image: docker.io/library/mariadb:latest
    name: db
    securityContext:
      capabilities:
        drop:
        - CAP_MKNOD
        - CAP_NET_RAW
        - CAP_AUDIT_WRITE
    tty: true
    volumeMounts:
    - mountPath: /var/lib/mysql
      name: data-mariadb-host-0
  volumes:
  - hostPath:
      path: /data/mariadb
      type: Directory
    name: data-mariadb-host-0
```

**Describe the results you expected:**
Expected to see `env` fields in the output yml such as in the man page for `podman-generate-kube`
```
spec:
                containers:
                - command:
                  - docker-entrypoint.sh
                  - mysqld
                  env:
                  - name: HOSTNAME
                  - name: GOSU_VERSION
                    value: "1.10"
                  - name: GPG_KEYS
                    value: "199369E5404BD5FC7D2FE43BCBCB082A1BB943DB \t177F4010FE56CA3336300305F1656F24C74CD1D8
                      \t430BDF5C56E7C94E848EE60C1C4CBDCDCD2EFD2A \t4D1BB29D63D98E422B2113B19334A25F8507EFA5"
                  - name: MARIADB_MAJOR
                    value: "10.3"
                  - name: MARIADB_VERSION
                    value: 1:10.3.10+maria bionic
                  - name: MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD
                    value: x
                  image: quay.io/baude/demodb:latest

```



**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:      3.4.2
API Version:  3.4.2
Go Version:   go1.16.6
Built:        Thu Jan  1 01:00:00 1970
OS/Arch:      linux/arm64
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**

```
(paste your output here)
```

**Package info (e.g. output of `rpm -q podman` or `apt list podman`):**


**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide? (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/troubleshooting.md)**


No
